issue_body:
As the new builds cannot use the existing "single golden zip release" update-style system, we need a new update file format.

This is a great opportunity to revisit the manifest format and make an actual documented file format.
pr_body:
Fixed some issues with the manifest urls.
Changed to records and nullable in some places.
Regenerated the test-keys to use RSA208.
Changed to using built-in JSON for manifest.
This fixes #5145
